Home / Scheduling & Calendars / Cal.com

Cal.com — open source alternative

Open source Calendly alternative — self-host or cloud.

Strengths

  • Feature-rich — routing, round-robin, teams.
  • Rapidly developed open source community.
  • Integrations with Zoom, Google Cal, Outlook.

Weaknesses

  • Self-hosting has many env vars and OAuth apps.
  • Upgrade path breaks occasionally.
  • Some team features gated on cloud.
License: AGPL-3.0 Self-host difficulty: 3/5 Hosted cloud optionMobile: iOS, Android

Official site · Source on GitHub

Ad slot — OSS middle

Cal.com is used as an alternative to

Calendly

Appointment scheduling and meeting links.

See all alternatives →
